---
title: "Abdelkarim el Ghani"
subtitle: "Statistical Data Analyst | Neuroscientist"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
format: 
  html:
    template-partials:
      - _assets/title-block.html
#    css:
#      - index.css
resources:
  - "_assets/**"
  - "images/**"
#  - particles.json
---
